title: How did EoE do at the box office
display_title: How did EoE do at the box office
wikitext:
[]: How did EoE do at the box office?             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:10 pm I can't find this information anywhere, but does anyone know how well did it do at the Japanese box office? I also noticed that it was released a week after Princess Mononoke, it must have been amazing to have two great films shown within one week of each other!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:51 pm According to wikipedia, it grossed over $10mil: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/History_of_anime#1990s From Billboard Magazine, Volume 110, Page 24 : "The box office success of the films was matched to a large degree by the solid sales racked up by the album and singles of the soundtrack material." This article says EoE grossed $12.6 mil.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:59 pm Ornette wrote: According to wikipedia, it grossed over $10mil: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/History_of_anime#1990s From Billboard Magazine, Volume 110, Page 24 : "The box office success of the films was matched to a large degree by the solid sales racked up by the album and singles of the soundtrack material." This article says EoE grossed $12.6 mil.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Wed Aug 18, 2010 7:32 pm What was the budget?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 02 » Thu Aug 19, 2010 1:23 am ^ Anno's retirement pension. Oh, wait. That's Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Thu Aug 19, 2010 3:14 am Eva 02 wrote: ^ Anno's retirement pension. Oh, wait. That's Rebuild.
